insights.title: Baton Rouge Housing Market: House Prices & Trends | Redfin
insights.insight: What is the housingmarketlike inBatonRougetoday? In March 2026,BatonRougehome prices were up 2.3% compared to last year, selling for a median price of $237K. On average, homes inBatonRougesell after 45 days on themarketcompared to 83 days last year. There were 178 homes sold in March this year, down from 182 last year.

insights.title: Wholesale Real Estate Deals in Baton Rouge, LA | DispoBridge
insights.insight: WholesaleReal Estate inBatonRouge,LABatonRouge, Louisiana (pop. 227K) is a mid-size South market wherewholesaledealsmove quickly and buyer competition keeps assignment fees healthy. Neighborhoods like Downtown, Mid City, Garden District are especially active for off-market transactions.
